name: plugin.anthropic-provider.oauth-access
description: OAuth access token (managed by login flow)

name: plugin.anthropic-provider.oauth-refresh
description: OAuth refresh token (managed by login flow)

name: plugin.anthropic-provider.oauth-expires
description: OAuth token expiry timestamp (managed by login flow)

name: plugin.anthropic-provider.effort
description: Effort level: low, medium, high, xhigh (Opus 4.7 only), max (default: xhigh)

name: plugin.anthropic-provider.hide-thinking
description: Hide thinking messages from chat (default: false)

name: plugin.anthropic-provider.hide-intermediate-steps
description: Hide intermediate tool calls, show only final answer (default: false)
